title: Complete Turtle Armor
description: This Mod completes the Turtle Armor !
body:
![titre mod](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/706d376de7963b9efa897d4f18ba4c997574f48d.png)

## Complete Turtle Armor

The Turtle Set mod is a Minecraft mod that complements the Turtle armor.

Why download our mod and not other Turtle mods?

This mod adopts a vanilla style. By adding it to Minecraft, you'll feel like you're playing Minecraft and not another game. If you like the vanilla style, don't hesitate to check it out.

The Turtle Armor Effects :
- **Helmet _(Vanilla)_:** 10 seconds of Water Breathing
- **Leggings:** Dolphins Grace **1**
- **Boots:** Speed **1**

This mod is available on both the client and server. For the fabric version, you need to install the [Fabric API](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-api).
